title: The two-cell average preserves a constant field

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: If both cell values are the same constant u, their two-cell average is u.
informal.expected_conclusion: The average of two equal cell values is the same value.

declarations.name: cellAverage2
declarations.statement: def cellAverage2 (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := (u0 + u1) / 2

declarations.name: cellAverage2_const
declarations.statement: theorem cellAverage2_const (u : Real) : cellAverage2 u u = u

tasks.input: Translate constant preservation of the two-cell average into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem cellAverage2_const (u : Real) : cellAverage2 u u = u

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the average and simplifying the arithmetic.
